title: Hermit's Garden+
description: An overgrown garden of magic!  Tendrils of vines and roots twisting their way into everything...
body:
A pack I started forever ago, moved to 1.12.2!  ~~And to Modrinth~~
The same concepts apply as the old pack, and any mods missing between versions, I've done my best to find replacements for.  Eventually, I'd like for everything to be tied together, so no one can specialize in just one magic mod.  I want to encourage everyone to explore everything in the pack.  And since they're all magical, I'll also do what i can to help folks explore everything from the comfort of their own home...  Eventually...

So feel free to build that wizard tower on the coast and ignore the humdrum of common man who has to go out and dive into caves and study up on one of several different schools of magic!  Or all of them at once...

### Uplifted from 1.7.10:

Witchery: Resurrected -  A classic magic mod, now in 1.12.2.  Explore the world of witchcraft by brewing potions in your cauldron, binding a familiar, gathering a coven, and performing rituals.

Botania - Magic flowers are scattered about the world, calling you to pluck their petals and unlock their power.

Thaumcraft - For those who would rather study and explore instead of gardening.

Blood Magic - If exploring and plants aren't really your thing, why not use the life force of mobs?

 
### And new to 1.12.2, a few extra mods to fill the gaps:

Wizardry - A mod that adds some fun wizard items and promises the ability to craft your own spells

Embers Rekindled - If Botania is for Elves, than this mod is for the Dwarves.  Harvest some sparks from bedrock and shoot them from pylon to pylon to craft some truly fantastic tools.

Mahou Tsukai - Another magic mod, but this one focuses more on what the others don't...

Divine Favor - Instead of working alone, ally yourself with powerful spirits by building their shrines and impressing them, and maybe they'll grant you their powers...

Astral Sorcery - A bit more exploring required to get started, but now the stars are your source of power

Roots - All about nature here.  A mod centered around druidic magics and wild stuff.

~~---------------~~

And of course there's a healthy addition of things to help decorate your hermitage, and keep you entertained long after you've done all you think you can...  Tame some dragons, fight a cyclops, cage a gorgon, breed fairies, become a Deep One, do some surgery, brew some alcohol!  Do more than i can even tell you about!

And all of this, somehow able to run on a potato...

_Speaking of which..._

<details>
<summary>Mods from Modrinth</summary>

[Biomes O' Plenty (by Forstride)](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) [ARR] : More biomes and things to collect

[Blood Magic  (by WayofTime)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-magic) [CC-BY-4.0] : Your literal blood, sweat, and tears (and that of others), poured into magic

[Chocobo Knights of the Crafting Table (by BladeandFeather)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chocobo-knights-of-the-crafting-table) [ARR] : Adds some big birds and cat dudes to befriend

[Divine Favor (by Aurocosh)](https://modrinth.com/mod/divine-favor) [ARR] : Gain the favor of the divine and unleash havoc

[Ears (by Unascribed)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ears) [MIT] : A little extra customization for your skins

[Embers Construct (by Peatral)](https://modrinth.com/mod/embersconstruct) [MIT] : Tinker's Construct shenanigans now have to be performed with Embers' items >:D

[Ex Sartagine: Requiem (by Foreck1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ex-sartagine-requiem) [LGPL-3.0-only] : Save your coal and cook stuff for cheaper

[Forestry (by ramidzkh)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forestry) [LGPL-3.0-only] : Don't get too excited...  I purged almost everything except the bees, 'cause what's a garden without bees?

[Ice and Fire: Dragons (by AlexModGuy)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) [LGPL-3.0-only] : More mobs!  Some that will kill you!

[Lost Cities - LTS (by Temptes051)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lost-cities-lts) [MIT] : Adds some new worldgen features, or a new dimension to trounce about in.  (Worldtypes may not be fully compatible with some mods)

[Mahou Tsukai (by stepsword)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mahou-tsukai) [ARR] : Promises to fill the gaps others left behind (in terms of magic)

[Personal Worlds (by lrgendwer01)](https://modrinth.com/mod/personal-worlds) [LGPL-3.0-only] : Craft your own world with whatever you want

[PlusTIC (by queengooborg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/plustic-reforged) [GPL-3.0-or-later] : Adds some more alloys and *friggin' laser guns*

[Quark (by Vazkii)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) [CC-BY-NC-SA-3.0] : New blocks and crafting methods that I need to work on...

[Reliquary Reincarnations (by P3pp3rF1y)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reliquary-reincarnations) [ARR] : New shinies to play with

[RLArtifacts (by fonnymunkey)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rlartifacts) [MIT] : More fun baubles to collect...  And maybe a mimic?

[Storage Drawers (by Texelsaur)](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) [MIT] : Drawers for storing things!

[Stygian End Continuation (by quentin452)](https://modrinth.com/mod/stygian-end-continuation) [MIT] : Pretty and dangerous biomes in the end

[Thaumic Additions (by Zeith)](https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic-additions) [ARR] : Because Thaumcraft is often times *too* balanced

[Time Control (by unixkitty)](https://modrinth.com/mod/time-control) [ARR] : Make a Minecraft day last as long as you feel like it should.

[Tinkers Construct (by KnightMiner)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) [MIT] : More bang for your buck.  More power for your truck!

[Trinkets and Baubles (by XzeroAir)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles) [LGPL-3.0] : Adds some races you can be and a few magical gewgaws

[Waystones (by BlayTheNinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) [ARR] : Adds some waystones that spawn naturally in villages.  An easy solution for fast travel.

<details>
<summary>Libraries, QOLs, and support mods</summary>

[AutoRegLib (by Vazkii)](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoreglib) [[Multiple](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/AutoRegLib#autoreglib)] : Library mod for Botania and Quark

[BlahajASM (by Valiray)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blahajasm) [LGPL-2.1-only] : Fork of a fork of a fork of a fork of a-...  Makes various improvements to MC so your game will run smooth in all directions, like a shark

[CodeChickenLib (by Covers1624)](https://modrinth.com/mod/codechicken-lib) [LGPL-2.1-or-later] : Library for Roots and PersonalWorlds

[Config Anytime (by Cleanroom)](https://modrinth.com/mod/configanytime) [MIT] : Required for Universal Tweaks

[Crafting Tweaks (by BlayTheNinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks) [ARR] : Adds some handy buttons to your crafting menus.

[CraftTweaker (by Jaredlll08)](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker) [MIT] : Tweaks (almost) EVERYTHING!!!  For scripts

[Fluidlogged API (by jbredwards)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fluidlogged-api) [ARR] : Put fluids on stars and stuff, just like (\*retches*) modern Minecraft

[Forgelin Continuous(by chaosunity)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgelin-continuous) [LGPL-3.0-or-later] : Requirement for __Divine Favor__, __Ex Nihilio: Creatio__, __LibrarianLib__, and __Wizardry__

[Guide-API (by TehNut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/guide-api-legacy) [MIT] : Requirement for GuideBook

[HammerLib (by Zeith)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hammer-lib) [ARR] : Requirement for __Thaumic Additions: Reconstructed__

[Hwyla (by TehNut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hwyla) [CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0] : You look at stuff, and you know what it is

[Just Enough Items (JEI) (by mezz)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) [MIT] : The thing that lets you browse recipes and items in your inventory

[LibrarianLib-Continuous (by chaosunity)](https://modrinth.com/mod/librarianlib-continuous)) [GLPL-3.0-only] : Requirement for __Wizardry__, and maybe others

[Witchery: Companion (by SmokeyTheBandicoot)](https://modrinth.com/mod/witchery-companion) [CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0] : Various bug fixes and additions to Witchery Resurrected

[Roughly Enough IDs (by Lilythii)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reid) [MIT] : Adds more IDs to Minecraft?  Better to have this than _not_...

[Mantle (by KnightMiner)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mantle) [MIT] : Requirement for __Tinkers Construct__, and I guess also __Natura__.  Will also layer your hearts instead of adding new rows

[MixinBooter (by Cleanroom)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter) [LGPL-2.1] : Required by...  A lot of things...

[ModTweaker (by Jaredlll08)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modtweaker) [MIT] : Tweaks mods!  ...just a few though

[ModularUI (by brachy)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modularui) [LGPL-3.0-only] : Requirement for __Personal Worlds__

[MTLib (by Jaredlll08)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtlib) [MIT] : For several members of the Tweaker-Posse

[Patchouli (by Vazkii)](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) [ CC-BY-NC-SA-3.0] : Makes the fancy guidebooks for __Blood Magic__, __Botania__, __Divine Favors__, __Extra Botany__, __Mystical World__...  Oh, and __Roots__

</details>

</details>
